title: OuterOres
description: Exploits minerals in water to generate cobblestone and ores!
body:
_**Water has minerals in it, right?**_

**OuterOres** push this concept to his limit, especially in skyblocks, where minerals/ores are very difficult to get.

OuterOres then provides 6 Tiers of Filter blocks: Wooden Filter, Stone Filter, Iron Filter, Gold Filter, Emerald Filter and Diamond Filter.

*   Note that each filter can generate a item of one tier above every 60 ticks.
* Copper Filter is the only one that generate Copper Ore, however it's crafted from sand and Wooden Filter.

![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de2ee5fdf96831428fc1cf9bb6ae97ef6e76c3f2.png)
 ![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/093a46c224d80dff4b7a4f57f951213c752cdc2c.png)

# Q&A

## So, water goes at the other side of the filter, can I infinitely get water?

*   Nope! I especially coded filters in a way that places full water at the other sides, but you can't get that water, it won't work lol. The filter also is waterlogged but same, you can't generate water from this x)

## It doesn't work, did I do something wrong?

*   You need to place water behind the filter, and place smooth stone below the water and below the filter.
